meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Pricing Strategies to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with this advanced SaaS pricing guide. Master monetization logic using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop building 'to-do' lists. Instead, architect a SaaS project around a dynamic pricing engine. By implementing multi-tier subscription logic and usage-based billing, you transform a simple student project into a professional-grade portfolio piece. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to automate your complex billing API integrations.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your repository remains empty. You are trapped in the 'tutorial purgatory'—where you know the syntax but lack the vision to build something that actually matters. The gap between a student project and a production-ready SaaS isn't just code; it's the ability to handle value exchange.

Today, we shatter that barrier. We aren't just building an app; we are architecting a business engine. By focusing on SaaS pricing logic, you force yourself to solve real-world engineering challenges like authentication, secure transactions, and state management. Let’s turn your 'no project' problem into a high-value asset.

steps.title: Define the Value Metric
steps.description: Identify the core resource your app consumes (e.g., API calls, storage, compute time). This is the foundation of your pricing model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a technical schema for a multi-tier SaaS pricing model including Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers, focusing on usage-based limits.

steps.title: Architect Subscription Logic
steps.description: Build the backend service to handle user state transitions between subscription tiers securely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust service class in TypeScript to handle user subscription state changes and tier validation logic.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing API
steps.description: Connect your logic to Stripe to handle real-world payment webhooks and session management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure webhook handler for Stripe events, ensuring subscription status updates are atomic and error-resistant.

steps.title: Build the Pricing Table UI
steps.description: Create a high-converting UI component that dynamically reflects your pricing tiers based on user status.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive pricing table component using Tailwind CSS that highlights the 'Pro' plan and fetches data from the backend.

steps.title: Implement Usage Metering
steps.description: Add a middleware to track user activity and prevent overages, demonstrating advanced backend engineering skills.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Express middleware that logs API usage per user and blocks requests once limits are exceeded.

pro_tips: Always build a 'hidden' audit log for payment events; it's the first thing recruiters look for in a backend.
Use Feature Flags to toggle pricing tiers in production without redeploying your entire application.
Implement 'Grace Periods' for failed payments—it shows you understand real-world user retention.
Never hardcode prices; fetch them from your database to allow for dynamic marketing experiments.
Optimize your database queries for subscription checks; this is a common bottleneck in high-scale SaaS.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing engine is live, deploy your project to Vercel or Railway and share the live link on your GitHub profile and LinkedIn to showcase your end-to-end engineering capabilities.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to turn a blank screen into a professional SaaS product that demonstrates both technical depth and business acumen. Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start engineering the infrastructure that makes any idea profitable. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
